requirement_topic.en: General Product Safety — Australian Consumer Law and AS/NZS Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 一般产品安全——澳大利亚消费者法及AS/NZS证据
requirement_topic.zht: 一般產品安全——澳洲消費者法及AS/NZS證據

summary.en: Australian suppliers must not supply unsafe consumer goods and must comply with any applicable mandatory standards, bans, recalls, reporting duties, and consumer guarantees under the Australian Consumer Law. For lithium batteries and power banks, there is no single ACCC mandatory standard equivalent to China's GB 31241 for all portable lithium battery packs. However, suppliers are expected to source and test products against relevant Australian/New Zealand or international safety standards and keep evidence that the product is safe for foreseeable use and misuse.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚供应商不得供应不安全消费品，并须遵守澳大利亚消费者法下适用的强制标准、禁令、召回、报告义务及消费者保障。对于锂电池和移动电源，澳大利亚没有一个覆盖所有便携式锂电池组、完全等同于中国GB 31241的ACCC单一强制标准。但供应商通常应依据相关澳大利亚/新西兰或国际安全标准采购和测试产品，并保存产品在可预见使用及误用下安全的证据。
summary.zht: 澳洲供應商不得供應不安全消費品，並須遵守澳洲消費者法下適用的強制標準、禁令、召回、報告義務及消費者保障。對於鋰電池和行動電源，澳洲沒有一個覆蓋所有便攜式鋰電池組、完全等同於中國GB 31241的ACCC單一強制標準。但供應商通常應依據相關澳洲/紐西蘭或國際安全標準採購和測試產品，並保存產品在可預見使用及誤用下安全的證據。

standards_or_laws: Competition and Consumer Act 2010, Schedule 2 — Australian Consumer Law — mandatory
Applicable ACCC mandatory safety standards and bans where product features are in scope — mandatory
AS/NZS and IEC standards used as voluntary technical evidence unless incorporated into a mandatory instrument or regulator requirement

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 31241-2022, CCC certification where applicable, factory quality-control records, and export inspection or platform listing evidence. Those records may be useful technical inputs, but they do not show that the Australian supplier has performed Australian Consumer Law due diligence, checked Australian mandatory standards and bans, or prepared Australian recall and incident-reporting processes.
summary.zh: 中国通常依赖GB 31241-2022、适用情况下的CCC认证、工厂质量控制记录、出口检验或平台上架资料。这些资料可作为技术输入，但不能证明澳大利亚供应商已履行澳大利亚消费者法尽职调查、核查澳大利亚强制标准及禁令，或准备澳大利亚召回及事故报告流程。
summary.zht: 中國通常依賴GB 31241-2022、適用情況下的CCC認證、工廠品質控制記錄、出口檢驗或平台上架資料。這些資料可作為技術輸入，但不能證明澳洲供應商已履行澳洲消費者法盡職調查、核查澳洲強制標準及禁令，或準備澳洲召回及事故報告流程。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — lithium cell and battery safety
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) catalogue requirements where applicable
Product platform or customs documentation used for China export workflows

gap.en: The practical gap is governance rather than a single test report. Australian supply requires a product-safety file that maps the SKU to Australian mandatory standards, applicable AS/NZS or IEC test evidence, warning labels, instructions, incident monitoring, and recall readiness. Chinese documentation should be reviewed and supplemented with Australian-market risk assessment, not treated as automatic market-access approval.
gap.zh: 实际差距不只是单一检测报告，而是治理体系。澳大利亚供应需要产品安全文件，将SKU与澳大利亚强制标准、适用AS/NZS或IEC测试证据、警示标签、说明书、事故监测及召回准备逐项对应。中国资料应经澳大利亚市场风险评估并补充，而不能视为自动市场准入批准。
gap.zht: 實際差距不只是單一檢測報告，而是治理體系。澳洲供應需要產品安全文件，將SKU與澳洲強制標準、適用AS/NZS或IEC測試證據、警示標籤、說明書、事故監測及召回準備逐項對應。中國資料應經澳洲市場風險評估並補充，而不能視為自動市場准入批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Australian Consumer Law product safety duties and any applicable ACCC mandatory standards or bans are mandatory; AS/NZS and IEC standards are voluntary technical evidence unless specifically incorporated into law or a regulator requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Partly mandatory — GB 31241 and CCC may be mandatory for relevant China-market categories, but they are not Australian Consumer Law compliance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China export pack should be converted into an Australian product-safety file before supply. Use AS/NZS or IEC evidence to support safety claims, but name only the Australian Consumer Law and applicable ACCC mandatory standards as mandatory unless a standard is incorporated by a legal instrument.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国出口资料包应在供应前转换为澳大利亚产品安全文件。可使用AS/NZS或IEC证据支持安全主张，但除非标准被法律文书纳入，否则只应将澳大利亚消费者法及适用ACCC强制标准称为强制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國出口資料包應在供應前轉換為澳洲產品安全文件。可使用AS/NZS或IEC證據支持安全主張，但除非標準被法律文書納入，否則只應將澳洲消費者法及適用ACCC強制標準稱為強制要求。
